business.name: Mr. Handy ATL
business.tagline: Fix it right the first time

hero.headline: *Xavier's crew* — the handyman Atlanta calls
hero.subheadline: From loose trim to full floor replacements, we show up ready to work

services.title: Flooring & Trim Work
services.description: Hardwood installation, trim replacement, and finish carpentry that looks like it was always there.

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.description: Patio sets, office furniture, and anything with mysterious instructions — assembled fast and solid.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: The daily fixes that keep your home working — from squeaky doors to wobbly shelves.

services.title: Moving Assistance
services.description: Heavy lifting, careful handling, and quick reassembly at your new place.

about.heading: Real people, real solutions
about.body: Xavier and the Mr. Handy ATL crew handle everything from quick fixes to full project work. We're the team Atlanta calls when it needs done right.

reviews.name: Relief M.
reviews.text: Xavier went above and beyond. Stayed longer to make sure we had a solution. His professionalism and communication were excellent from start to finish.

reviews.name: Adam S.
reviews.text: Xavier and his team did a fantastic job replacing the hardwood floors in my condo. Great attitude the entire time and went above and beyond delivering quality work.

reviews.name: Harrison G.
reviews.text: He did a great job installing the trim for my new microwave. Highly recommend. Very friendly and professional.

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed?
cta.body: Call Xavier's crew for your free estimate. Same honest pricing, same quality work that earned us 4.9 stars.
